use_cases: Display user profile pictures in navigation headers and user menus
Show avatars in comment sections and forum posts
Present team members in about pages and organizational charts
Display contact images in messaging interfaces
Show product creator or seller avatars in marketplace listings
ai_summary: A reusable avatar component built on Radix UI primitives with support for images and fallback initials. Provides a clean, accessible way to display user profile pictures across various contexts like user menus, comments, contact lists, and team directories. Uses standard Tailwind styling for easy customization.
